$comment: Cross-repo lockstep pin (spec 031). Binds the acme-vue-encore generator + module catalog to the template-encore baseline structure and (once pinned) to the frozen app-invariant spec hashes (001 architecture, 002 security/data). The invariant-hash pin is DEFERRED to the Phase 3 handshake: 001 changes in Phase 2 (it absorbs the static-serving wiring from spec 010), so pinning its current hash now would lock a value about to change. The mechanism is fully wired; flip invariantPin.status to 'pinned' and fill hashes in Phase 3.

invariantPin.reason: 001 absorbs the static-serving wiring from spec 010 in Phase 2; pin the 001/002 hashes in the Phase 3 handshake after the template session finalizes those specs.
